name: Network Connection to Suspicious Server
description: Detects network connections to file sharing, code hosting, and dynamic DNS services commonly used by adversaries for data transfer and command and control. While these services have legitimate uses, connections from unusual processes or hosts should be investigated.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the network connection event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The event ID (e.g., Sysmon Event ID 3 for network connection).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that initiated the network connection.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the process that initiated the network connection.

parameters.name: destination_host
parameters.description: The destination hostname or IP address of the network connection.

parameters.name: destination_domain
parameters.description: The resolved destination domain of the network connection.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port of the network connection.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL involved in the connection, if applicable.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was running.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
